refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly include the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime statistics over the evaluation period using telemetry data to verify availability meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover teleoperation link to meet availability target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use link health monitoring and predictive failure detection algorithms.
DP3: Employ adaptive bandwidth management and error correction protocols.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

coupling_check.notes: Redundant links and failover logic are modular and can be encapsulated without tight coupling to other DPs.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of multiple network paths at the worksite.
Risk that failover timing may not meet strict availability targets under extreme conditions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating predictive failure detection (DP2) in future refinement to enhance robustness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for managing teleoperation link connectivity, monitoring, and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and health metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections managed by Teleoperation module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands dependent on link availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion risk if link management logic is spread across NGHE Solution.
Vehicle module should not contain link availability logic to avoid diffusion.
Best containment and minimal diffusion by centralizing link availability here.
Safety Services consumes alerts but should not manage link availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management in Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and clarifies ownership.
containment_risks: Potential single point of failure if Teleoperation module is compromised.
Interface dependencies with NGHE Solution and Safety Services must be well-defined.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and fallback strategies to mitigate single point of failure risk.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR of achieving target link availability.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk by assigning DP to Teleoperation module.
Ensure failover logic is not duplicated in other modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the best IM boundary for this DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and link status monitoring is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility for link availability to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Incorporate predictive failure detection in next refinement level.
Strengthen interface definitions between Teleoperation and Safety Services.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition is sound, adding predictive failure detection and refining interface contracts will improve robustness and clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover teleoperation link to meet availability target.

revise.why: To integrate predictive failure detection and enhance failover robustness.

assumptions: Multiple network paths are available for redundancy.
Telemetry data is reliable for verification.
open_risks: Failover timing under extreme conditions may not meet availability target.
Single point of failure risk in Teleoperation module.
evidence_needed: Telemetry logs demonstrating link availability over evaluation period.
Test results of failover mechanisms under simulated failure scenarios.
